title: nigella arvensis subsp. hispanica
intro: Nigella arvensis subsp. hispanica, also known as Spanish fennel or black cumin, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Nigella arvensis subsp. hispanica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues. Nigella arvensis subsp. hispanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
